bead.title: Migrate service_models.go and service_subscription_quota.go claude consumers
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05D
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. service_models.go uses ModelDiscoveryHarness for claude alias resolution
2. service_subscription_quota.go consumes QuotaStatus.RoutingPreference; claudeQuotaMaxUsedPercent derives over QuotaStatus.Windows uniformly across claude and codex
3. Type assertion on *claudeharness.ClaudeQuotaSnapshot at service_subscription_quota.go:79 is removed
4. go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass
